debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

proof:
have nposR : (0:ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have nne : (n:ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt nposR
  have ngeN : (n:ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have eq1 : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = 2 * (b - a) / δ := by field_simp
  have key : 2 * (b - a) / δ < n := by
    calc 2 * (b - a) / δ = 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := eq1.symm
      _ < N := hN
      _ ≤ n := ngeN
  have h1 : 2 * (b - a) < n * δ := by
    have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right key hδ₁
    rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (ne_of_gt hδ₁)] at this
  have h2 : 2 * (b - a) / n < n * δ / n := div_lt_div_of_pos_right h1 nposR
  rwa [mul_div_cancel_left₀ _ nne] at h2
successful_attempts:
have nposR : (0:ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have nne : (n:ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt nposR
  have ngeN : (n:ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have eq1 : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) = 2 * (b - a) / δ := by field_simp
  have key : 2 * (b - a) / δ < n := by
    calc 2 * (b - a) / δ = 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := eq1.symm
      _ < N := hN
      _ ≤ n := ngeN
  have h1 : 2 * (b - a) < n * δ := by
    have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right key hδ₁
    rwa [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (ne_of_gt hδ₁)] at this
  have h2 : 2 * (b - a) / n < n * δ / n := div_lt_div_of_pos_right h1 nposR
  rwa [mul_div_cancel_left₀ _ nne] at h2
